perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with dyed orange hair wearing a white hoodie stands in a paved outdoor park area; he looks up at the sky and then tries to put on a pair of sunglasses, but pokes himself in the right eye and covers it with his hand. (2) The scene cuts to the man sitting on the ground in the same park; he holds a plastic drink cup and tries to insert a straw into his mouth, but misses and pokes his cheek, grimacing. (3) The scene cuts to the man walking along a park path; he takes a bite out of a rice ball, then turns to the camera with a shocked expression, revealing blackened or missing front teeth while gesturing wildly with his hand toward his head.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately. A male voice speaks in a cheerful, energetic tone. A sharp metallic 'clink' sound effect is heard, followed by a loud, high-pitched male scream of pain. (2) The male voice speaks again in the same energetic tone over the continuous BGM. A sliding sound effect followed by a 'thud' occurs, followed by another loud male scream. (3) The male voice speaks a third time as the BGM continues. A crunching sound effect is heard, followed by a very loud, distorted, and sustained male scream of frustration, ending with a comical whistle sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '太陽好大啊 來戴個太陽眼鏡好了' (The sun is so bright, let's put on sunglasses) in a cheerful tone. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '戳!' (Poke!) in yellow variety-show style font. (3) Functional Text: '口好渴啊 來喝個飲料好了' (I'm so thirsty, let's have a drink) in a neutral tone. (4) Decorative/Hook Text: '捅!' (Stab!) in yellow variety-show style font. (5) Functional Text: '哎唷 肚子有點餓 來吃個御飯糰好了' (Oh, I'm a bit hungry, let's eat a rice ball) in a casual tone. (6) Decorative/Hook Text: '啊咧!' (A-re!) in large yellow font indicating shock. (7) Functional Text: '搞什麼東西啊? なんだよ バカ 八嘎!!' (What the heck? What is it, idiot!) in a mix of Chinese and Japanese characters, conveying anger.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Failed Action 1 -> Failed Action 2 -> Failed Action 3/Climax

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator performing the skit throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian male with short, dyed bright orange/brown hair, wearing a white hooded sweatshirt with black text patterns on the sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Different areas of a public park or residential plaza, featuring paved tiles, green trees, bushes, and residential buildings in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Setup -> Failure -> Setup -> Failure -> Setup -> Final Comedic Failure.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed for comedic entertainment using slapstick humor. By repeating a cycle of attempting a simple task and failing in a painful or absurd way, the creator builds anticipation for the final, most exaggerated failure (losing teeth while eating). The use of high-energy BGM and exaggerated screaming reactions aims to engage a social media audience with quick-fire comedy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Generic food and drink containers are used as props without any visible brand logos or promotional messaging.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature exaggerated screaming and high-contrast text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-paced editing style and 'variety show' aesthetics (colorful fonts, SFX) common in East Asian short-form video comedy skits.
